projects.title: pdf2calc
projects.description: A bulk conversion script that turns multiple PDF files into TI-Nspire or HP Prime compatible files. It is especially useful for CPGE students preparing material for concours.

projects.title: Magrinov
projects.description: An application that allows technicians to keep track of wells and solar installations in the field.

projects.title: Salary Scraper
projects.description: I engineered a robust scraper to crawl official portals of the Moroccan Government, extracting and structuring complex fiscal data into actionable formats for analysts.

mobility.title: International Mobility
mobility.body: Coming from Morocco to study in France has been an important step in my personal and academic journey. It has allowed me to discover a new culture, adapt to a different environment, and become more independent. Through this experience, I am learning more about French culture and broadening my perspective. In the future, I would also like to take part in an international mobility during my third year to discover another country, learn from a new culture, and improve my language skills.

civic.title: Civic Engagement
civic.heading: Foreign Students Association
civic.body: I would like to create a student association at ENSEEIHT to help new students, especially international ones, settle in more easily. The aim would be to support them in finding accommodation, handling first administrative steps, and adapting to their new environment. Having arrived from Morocco myself, I know how challenging the beginning can be. Through this initiative, I want to make this transition smoother, less stressful, and more welcoming for future students. It would be a way to combine solidarity, practical support, and student engagement.

items.title: Freelance Java Developer
items.description: Worked on multiple Java projects, especially around the Minecraft game. I built several plugins that let server owners change gameplay behavior, automate systems, and customize the player experience.

items.title: Video Games
items.description: I like playing video games and exploring the systems, strategies, and design choices behind them.

items.title: Programming
items.description: I like programming and spending time building tools, experimenting with ideas, and learning new technologies.
